# Raw Extraction

```markdown
4.2.3.1. Exterior Lighting
1) _Exterior lighting_ allowances shall be based on the lighting zone in which the
_building_ is located, as determined from Table 4.2.3.1.-A.
|Col1|Table 4.2.3.1.-A Lighting Zones Used to Determine Exterior Lighting Allowances Forming Part of Sentence 4.2.3.1.(1)|
|---|---|
|Lighting Zone|Description|
|0|Undeveloped areas within national, provincial or territorial parks, forest land, and rural areas, and other undeveloped<br>areas|
|1|Developed areas within national,provincial or territorialparks, and rural areas|
|2|Areas predominantly consisting of residential zoning, neighbourhood business districts, light industrial areas with<br>limited nighttime use, and residential mixed-use areas|
|3|All other areas|
|4|High-activity commercial districts|
```
